---
title: "Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods Chapter Map"
description: "Reading map for selected Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods notes."
book_id: "qualitative-research-evaluation-methods"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Map"
citation_key: "patton_2015_qualitative_research_evaluation_methods"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:qualitative-research-evaluation-methods:mod08-module-8-integrating-the-12-strategic-qualitative-principles-in-practice-chapter:c0010"
  - "chunk:qualitative-research-evaluation-methods:mod20-module-20-practical-purposes-concrete-questions-and-actionable-answers-illuminat:c0005"
  - "chunk:qualitative-research-evaluation-methods:mod23-module-23-evaluating-program-models-and-theories-of-change-and-evaluation-models:c0024"
source_status: "needs_review"
---
## Source

This map uses selected MCP research-library sections from *Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods* [@patton_2015_qualitative_research_evaluation_methods].

## Reading Route

1. [Strategic Qualitative Principles in Practice](section-01-strategic-qualitative-principles.qmd) - pages 140-141; `Part 1 > Chapter 2: Strategic Themes in Qualitative Inquiry > Module 8`
2. [Practical and Actionable Qualitative Inquiry](section-02-practical-actionable-qualitative-inquiry.qmd) - pages 269-270; `Part 1 > Chapter 4: Practical and Actionable Qualitative Applications > Module 20`
3. [Program Models, Theories of Change, and Qualitative Methods](section-03-program-models-and-theories-of-change.qmd) - pages 314-316; `Part 1 > Chapter 4 > Module 23: Evaluating Program Models and Theories of Change`

## How to Use This Map

- Start with the first section for the book's framing logic.
- Use the middle section to inspect the main design or method implications.
- Use the final section to check limits, quality standards, or implications for use.

## References
